column1: Xavier Edwards leads today’s slate with a strong combination of recent form and reliability, recording a hit in nearly 79% of games and benefiting from a leadoff role, platoon edge, and a favorable park factor. Bobby Witt Jr. offers similar consistency atop the order with a slight edge in overall hit rate, also drawing a platoon advantage. Maikel Garcia and Spencer Horwitz round out the top options, but Edwards stands out as the most dependable choice for Beat The Streak entries.
